title: Saudi-Style Grilled Almond Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that blends the richness of creamy sauce with the authenticity of Saudi spices. Marinate chicken in a mix of saudi spices, then grill to perfection.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together Saudi spice blend, almond milk, almond butter, garlic, grill seasoning, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
7. Serve with lemon wedges and garnished with chopped parsley.
8. Meanwhile, grill sliced almonds in a small bowl until lightly toasted.
9. Sprinkle the toasted almonds over the top of the sliced chicken.
